memory:memory/2026-04-12.md:1:8.snippet: - Worked on `okx-trader-sim` in `C:\Users\Ziming\.openclaw\workspace\okx-trader-sim`. - User requirement hardened: keep OKX data real and consistent, show OKX API raw responses directly, avoid frontend-only derived views pretending to be authoritative. - Added/expanded OKX raw data display for account balance, positions, and order history, while keeping demo/live sync and connection testing. - Implemented strategy config for RAVE-USDT-SWAP using long-only rule: buy, then sell if price falls 1% from entry or 2% from post-entry peak; later user wanted parameter optimization via backtest rather than fixed defaults. - Built backtest support around RAVE-USDT-SWAP 1H candles, including grid search

memory:memory/2026-04-12.md:8:17.snippet: - Added richer backtest UI concepts: sortable results, apply-params action, K-line chart, buy/sell markers, tooltip details, trade detail view, and equity curve. Latest user feedback: equity-curve axes need to be clearer, and K-line absence online is because fresh Railway instances have no backtest detail until a run happens. - Railway deployment succeeded after browserless login flow. Deployed app URL: `https://okx-trader-sim-production.up.railway.app`. - Key Railway fix: default Node 18 failed with Next 16, so added `nixpacks.toml` requesting Node 20. - Caveat for future self: many settings/state are still stored only in server memory, so Railway restarts can wipe API config, strategy conf
